name: blueprint
description: v0.1.1 — Turn how you actually work into a process document a person, workflow, or agent could execute. A guided interview extracts what people forget to write down — triggers, data movement, decision criteria, exceptions, approval authority — then rates every step Automate, Monitor, or Human so you know what's safe to hand to an agent and what isn't. Quick mode builds a process inventory; deep mode produces an automation-ready Blueprint. Standalone; runs on its own. Part of the Kenzie Creative marketplace.
